title: 这条 prompt 详细描述了一个高端图形设计作品集的场景，适合用于展示设计师或创意机构的专业形象。适用于需要向客户或潜在雇主展示高质量设计能力的中文营销场景。
image_alt: 这条 prompt 详细描述了一个高端图形设计作品集的场景，适合用于展示设计师或创意机构的专业形象。适用于需要向客户或潜在雇主展示高质量设计能力的中文营销场景。
prompt_original: Create a premium graphic design portfolio mockup in a professional creative studio style. Show a clean, elegant workspace presentation featuring multiple graphic design project cards arranged in a refined grid layout, a modern laptop screen displaying a portfolio homepage, and several printed posters laid out neatly on the desk and mounted on the wall. Use a polished creative-director aesthetic with soft shadows, subtle depth, realistic materials, and a high-end studio atmosphere. Include sleek typography placeholders, branding samples, editorial-style poster designs, business cards, stationery, notebook, pen, coffee cup, desk lamp, and small plant for a realistic studio setup. The design should have a clean grid layout, balanced spacing, soft realistic shadows, premium lighting, and neutral luxury tones such as black, white, warm beige, gray, champagne, and cream. Make the laptop screen show a minimal portfolio interface with project thumbnails, navigation menu, and bold hero text. Add multiple portfolio project cards such as logo design, brand identity, poster design, packaging design, social media design, UI/UX design, and advertising campaign mockups. Arrange everything professionally with a modern minimalist style, sharp details, clean typography, elegant composition, and a premium creative agency presentation look. Style: high-end graphic design portfolio, modern creative studio, luxury branding mockup, clean desk setup, realistic shadows, editorial layout, minimalist premium design, professional presentation, 4K, ultra-detailed.
prompt_zh: 创建一个高端的图形设计作品集模拟图，采用专业创意工作室风格。展示一个干净、优雅的工作空间，其中包含多个以精致网格布局排列的图形设计项目卡片，现代笔记本电脑屏幕上显示作品集主页，以及几张整齐地放在桌面上和挂在墙上的印刷海报。使用具有柔和阴影、微妙深度、逼真材质和高端工作室氛围的精炼创意总监美学。包括简洁的字体占位符、品牌样本、编辑风格的海报设计、名片、文具、笔记本、笔、咖啡杯、台灯和小植物，以营造真实的办公环境。设计应具有干净的网格布局、平衡的间距、柔和逼真的阴影、高级照明和中性奢华色调，如黑色、白色、暖米色、灰色、香槟色和奶油色。让笔记本电脑屏幕显示一个极简的作品集界面，包含项目缩略图、导航菜单和大胆的标题文字。添加多个作品集项目卡片，如标志设计、品牌识别、海报设计、包装设计、社交媒体设计、UI/UX 设计和广告活动模拟图。以现代极简主义风格、锐利细节、干净的排版、优雅的构图和高端创意机构的呈现方式进行专业布置。风格：高端图形设计作品集、现代创意工作室、奢华品牌模拟图、整洁桌面设置、逼真阴影、编辑布局、极简主义高端设计、专业呈现、4K、超精细。
